rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relationship to Elec. Code §252.005, which governs where candidates file campaign treasurer appointments. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: An individual must file a campaign treasurer appointment for the individual's own candidacy with:
_note: No conflict; Elec. Code §252.005 concerns campaign treasurer appointment filing authority and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
